evals.prompt: Review the state and scope commands changes
evals.expected_output: A focused review with at most 5 high-signal findings, each with concrete failure scenarios

assertions.text: Every finding includes a concrete failure scenario or specific consequence
Every finding references a specific file and line number
Findings are grounded in review-prompt.md standards
